name: Soreheim Alliance
street_level_visibility: The roster is treated as explicit nation-level canon because the source set already strongly supports giant and broad mortal population enumeration.
visitor_signal: Visitors to Soreheim Alliance should perceive the dominant populations first and the secondary populations as stable but not polity-defining unless narrower locality canon states otherwise.
runtime_rule: Runtime narration may elaborate visible population mix but may not contradict canonical roster or exclusions.
